versions.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install kyverno oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=kyverno:3.5.2" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install kyverno-guardrails oci://registry.mirantis.com/k0rdent-enterprise-catalog/kgst \
  --set "chart=kyverno-guardrails:0.1.0" \
  -n kcm-system
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   kyverno-3-5-2                   true
# kcm-system   kyverno-guardrails-0-1-0        true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: mirantis-kyverno-guardrails
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: kyverno-3-5-2
      name: kyverno
      namespace: kyverno
    - template: kyverno-guardrails-0-1-0
      name: kyverno-guardrails
      namespace: kyverno

prerequisitesHtml:
Prerequisites

- k0rdent Enterprise - Kyverno must be installed in the cluster: Kyverno Install
